---
title: "Machine Learning — A Guide"
description: "Machine learning from first principles, told plainly and a little like a poem. Seven chapters, built to make the ideas click."
listing:
  contents: ml-guide/**/index.qmd
  sort: "order"
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, description, reading-time]
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="/styles/explainer.css">
      <style>
        .mlg-hero{ border:1px solid #e7e0d2; border-radius:20px; padding:2.4rem 2.6rem; margin:1rem 0 1.8rem; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fffdf9,#fbeadc); color:#3d3833; text-align:left; }
        .mlg-hero h2{ color:#1c1814 !important; border:none; margin:0 0 .6rem; font-size:2.1rem; font-family:'Fraunces',Georgia,serif; }
        .mlg-hero p{ color:#57534e; max-width:64ch; font-size:1.08rem; line-height:1.7; margin:0; font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-style:normal; }
        .mlg-toc{ counter-reset:ch; }
        .quarto-listing-default .listing-item{ border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.08); border-radius:12px;
          padding:1rem 1.2rem; margin:.6rem 0; transition:.15s; }
        .quarto-listing-default .listing-item:hover{ border-color:rgba(194,65,12,.4); transform:translateX(3px); }
      </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="mlg-hero">
  <h2>📘 Machine Learning, from the ground up</h2>
  <p>Seven chapters that build the whole field from a single idea — a function with dials you turn until it stops being wrong. No prior math assumed, plenty of pictures, and a few things you can drag and play with. Written plainly, and now and then like a poem.</p>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple" icon=false}
**The chapters.** Read in order, or wander. Each stands on its own.
:::
